channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Iran reportedly launches missiles as Trump mulls deal to pause war for two months
item.description: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.

item.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at new records, lifted by tech rally: Live updates
item.description: Tech resumed its leadership, and traders weighed a reported agreement between U.S. and Iranian negotiators to extend the ceasefire.

item.title: Dell shares jump 31% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
item.description: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.

item.title: Costco says it saw 'record-breaking' gas volumes amid rising prices
item.description: Costco saw "recording-breaking volumes" of gas sales and said rising fuel prices drove first-time members to its stations.

item.title: U.S. government is reportedly set to invest in drone industry. These are Wall Street’s favorite plays
item.description: Analysts believe that stocks such as Unusual Machines and Motorola Solutions are most likely to benefit from heightened interest in the drone industry.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Dell Technologies, American Eagle Outfitters, Gap & more
item.description: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

item.title: Anthropic tops OpenAI as most valuable AI startup, nears $1 trillion valuation in latest round
item.description: Anthropic is now the most valuable AI company in Silicon Valley after a new $65 billion funding round.

item.title: Snowflake surges 36% for best day ever on AI frenzy, fueling software rally
item.description: The Snowflake rally also lifted shares of ServiceNow, Oracle and Palantir, while Salesforce bucked the trend.

item.title: Disney's ABC files early broadcast licenses renewal 'under protest' against the FCC
item.description: Disney said it filed renewals for eight broadcast station licenses "under protest," after the FCC launched an early review years ahead of schedule.

item.title: Okta jumps 14%, tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
item.description: CEO Todd McKinnon said Okta is "playing a long game" on AI and is allocating more resources to agentic tools.

item.title: Americans’ savings rate falls to lowest level since 2022 as inflation outpaces paychecks
item.description: As inflation starts outpacing wages again, Americans have less money to put aside for emergencies and other savings goals.

item.title: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
item.description: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.

item.title: Gap shares tumble 14% as retailer cuts sales guidance after disappointing Old Navy performance
item.description: Gap issued mixed results as sales at its largest brand, Old Navy, fell short of estimates.

item.title: American Eagle's Aerie is booming, but its namesake brand is lagging despite Sydney Sweeney ads
item.description: American Eagle beat Wall Street's expectations but sales at its namesake banner fell short of estimates after its latest Sydney Sweeney campaign.

item.title: New '60 Minutes' head Nick Bilton says Paramount's CBS News hired him to pivot the show before ratings decline
item.description: Nick Bilton is a former New York Times columnist and has made several documentaries for Netflix, where he worked with CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss.

item.title: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."

item.title: The wealthiest investors are pulling money out of the U.S. in the 'de-dollarization' trade
item.description: Fears of an AI bubble, tariffs, a falling dollar, volatile economic policies and rising debt have caused many family offices to dial back their U.S. exposure

item.title: New York passes Mamdani's pied-a-terre tax. Here's who pays and how much
item.description: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin became the face of the tax after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani posted a video in front of Griffin's penthouse apartment.

item.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
item.description: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.

item.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
item.description: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

item.title: Red-hot Arm Holdings soars to another all-time high. What's fueling the move this time?
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: CNBC Select’s weekly mortgage rate snapshot: See your options today
item.description: Here's what mortgage rates are for the week ending May 28, according to Freddie Mac.

item.title: Traders' hopes fade for U.S.-Iran nuclear deal this year despite report on potential ceasefire agreement
item.description: Chances of a nuclear deal between the U.S. and Iran this year haven't moved much on prediction markets after Axios reported that the two agreed to a ceasefire.

item.title: Best mortgage lenders for first-time homebuyers in May 2026
item.description: Rocket Mortgage, Chase and Bank of America are among CNBC Select's top picks for first-time homebuyers.

item.title: Mythos was the critical trigger for IBM's open-source cybersecurity push, Krishna says
item.description: IBM has signed Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan and Bank of America onto its open-source cybersecurity effort called Project Lightwell.

item.title: CFTC bid to vacate order against Winklevoss' crypto exchange 'very unusual': ex-agency chief
item.description: Gemini's founders, Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, were donors to the 2024 election campaign of President Donald Trump.

item.title: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.

item.title: Reality star's long shot L.A. mayoral candidacy becomes surprise test for Democrats
item.description: Spencer Pratt is polling around 22%, just behind Democratic Mayor Karen Bass, in the Los Angeles mayoral primary, raising the odds of a November runoff.

item.title: Waymo opens Ojai robotaxis to select riders as company aims to lower cost of fleet expansion
item.description: Alphabet's Waymo is adding new vehicles to its fleet of public robotaxis and is opening up its roomier Ojai vehicles to some riders.

item.title: CNBC Sport: How James Dolan's hot streak could alter his business empire — and legacy
item.description: Decades of losing turned Knicks fans against owner James Dolan, but the team's recent success and Dolan's off-the-court ventures have cast him in a new light.
